data.content: Branch: foolery-b40e-version; Commit: b0c1e03fd119f453113d294093f86822a491bbad; Verification: built the launcher and confirmed --version and -V print the package.json version with no update banner output when FOOLERY_APP_DIR points at the repo checkout. Caveat: full Vitest execution is blocked in this environment because the local npm install produced empty dev-package directories and bun is not installed for repo hooks/toolchain.
